# Map Lead Extractor

A Chrome extension that extracts business leads from Google Maps and Bing Maps — names, phone numbers, websites, addresses, ratings, and emails — and exports them to CSV with no coding required.

## Primary Pages

- https://mapleadextractor.net/ — Home: product overview, features, and install CTA
- https://mapleadextractor.net/pricing — Pricing plans and feature comparison
- https://mapleadextractor.net/connect-extension — How to install and connect the extension
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog — Blog index: tutorials, comparisons, and outreach guides
- https://mapleadextractor.net/privacy — Privacy policy
- https://mapleadextractor.net/terms — Terms of service

## Free Tools

- https://mapleadextractor.net/tools — Free lead generation tools and calculators
- https://mapleadextractor.net/tools/roi-calculator — Google Maps lead generation ROI calculator
- https://mapleadextractor.net/tools/lead-value-calculator — Lead value and max cost-per-lead calculator
- https://mapleadextractor.net/tools/agency-pricing-calculator — Agency retainer pricing calculator

## Leads by Industry

- https://mapleadextractor.net/leads/real-estate-agents — Extract real estate agent & realtor leads from Google Maps
- https://mapleadextractor.net/leads/restaurants — Extract restaurant & food service leads from Google Maps
- https://mapleadextractor.net/leads/contractors — Extract contractor & home services leads from Google Maps
- https://mapleadextractor.net/leads/dentists — Extract dentist & dental practice leads from Google Maps
- https://mapleadextractor.net/leads/gyms-and-fitness — Extract gym & fitness studio leads from Google Maps
- https://mapleadextractor.net/leads/auto-repair-shops — Extract auto repair shop leads from Google Maps

- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/google-maps-vs-data-providers — Google Maps vs. ZoomInfo, Apollo, and Hunter: which is better in 2025?
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/bing-maps-lead-generation — Why Bing Maps is an untapped lead source your competitors are ignoring
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/cold-email-from-google-maps-leads — How to write cold emails that convert Google Maps leads
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/lead-generation-for-web-designers — Freelance web designer's guide to finding clients on Google Maps
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/gdpr-google-maps-scraping — Is finding leads on Google Maps legal? GDPR, ToS, and compliance guide
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/how-to-find-businesses-with-no-website — How to find local businesses with no website (the best leads for web designers)
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/where-to-buy-local-business-leads — Where to buy local business leads that actually convert
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/how-to-extract-emails-from-google-maps — How to extract business emails from Google Maps, free and no code
- https://mapleadextractor.net/blog/lead-generation-for-marketing-agencies — Lead generation playbook for digital marketing and SMMA agencies
